description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a well-manicured hedge and several mature trees, with a paved driveway leading to a garage on one side. The structure features a combination of flat and slightly sloped roofs, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a mix of white and light gray exterior walls. The front yard includes a small garden area and a pathway leading to the main entrance, while the backyard is enclosed and landscaped with additional greenery. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as multiple bedrooms and bathrooms. The property is bordered by a tall hedge, providing privacy from the surrounding urban environment. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat and sloped roofs, large windows, and landscaped gardens, surrounded by a privacy hedge and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garden, and pathway, with the garage visible on the left and a hedge enclosing the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large floor-to-ceiling windows, sloped roof section, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional windows, and the hedge boundary, with less emphasis on the entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, more of the flat roof, and the arrangement of trees and hedges around the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the side and rear
